summary: Excellent pre‑section recording captures a killer 1984 Dead show with standout performances of “I Need A Miracle”, “Bertha” and “China Doll”.
review: Fans rave about this unknown‑date 1984 concert, calling it a “killer” performance with Jerry Garcia playing flawlessly. The recording is praised as a perfect pre‑section capture that delivers clear, balanced sound throughout the set.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are strongly positive (average 4.5 stars), highlighting superb playing and a high‑quality recording; the consistency across reviewers gives high confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the pre‑section recording as perfect, crisp and great for an ’84 summer show with no noted drop‑outs or balance issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Solid first set followed by a spectacular second‑set opener (I Need A Miracle > Bertha > China Doll) that keeps the energy high throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Flawless, kicks ass, and praised for perfect guitar work.
